subcodes.title: Words to George Winterburn et al, spoken on 1904-02-07
subcodes.first_line: Through the bounty and favor of God think nothing difficult or impossible. God is so bountiful that He brings fire out from the stone
subcodes.subjects: @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times
